parameter.value:
<script>
  function getCookie(name) {
    var match = document.cookie.match(new RegExp('(^| )' + name + '=([^;]+)'));
    return match ? decodeURIComponent(match[2]) : '';
  }

  document.getElementById('gaField').value = getCookie('_ga');
  document.getElementById('utmField').value = getCookie('utm_campaign');
  
</script>

<script>
(function() {
  var outbox = window.__gtmPmOutbox;
  var origin = window.__gtmPmTargetOrigin;
  if (!origin || !outbox || !outbox.length) return;

  for (var i = 0; i < outbox.length; i++) {
    try {
      window.top.postMessage(JSON.stringify(outbox[i]), origin);
    } catch (err) {
      // Ignore send failures (e.g. page not actually embedded as an iframe).
    }
  }

  window.__gtmPmOutbox = [];
})();
</script>

tag.name: Set URL Decoration Config Global (Parent Site)

parameter.value:
<script>
(function() {
  // Idempotent: if the listener is already registered (e.g. tag fired twice), do nothing.
  if (window.gtmUrlDecorator && window.gtmUrlDecorator.decorate) { return; }

  function getHostname(url) {
    var match = url.match(/^https?:\/\/([^/?#]+)/i);
    return match ? match[1].toLowerCase() : '';
  }

  function isPermittedHost(url, permittedHosts) {
    var hostname = getHostname(url);
    if (!hostname) return false;
    for (var i = 0; i < permittedHosts.length; i++) {
      if (hostname === permittedHosts[i]) return true;
    }
    return false;
  }

  function buildQueryString(pairs) {
    var parts = [];
    for (var i = 0; i < pairs.length; i++) {
      parts.push(encodeURIComponent(pairs[i].name) + '=' + encodeURIComponent(pairs[i].value));
    }
    return parts.join('&');
  }

  function getExistingParamNames(base) {
    var existing = {};
    var qIdx = base.indexOf('?');
    if (qIdx !== -1) {
      var queryString = base.substring(qIdx + 1);
      var parts = queryString.split('&');
      for (var i = 0; i < parts.length; i++) {
        var eqIdx = parts[i].indexOf('=');
        var paramName = eqIdx !== -1 ? parts[i].substring(0, eqIdx) : parts[i];
        if (paramName) {
          existing[paramName] = true;
          existing[decodeURIComponent(paramName)] = true;
        }
      }
    }
    return existing;
  }

  // Append decoration pairs to a url, avoiding duplicates while preserving existing query params
  function decorateUrl(url, pairs, permittedHosts) {
    if (!url || url === 'about:blank') return url;
    if (!isPermittedHost(url, permittedHosts)) return url;

    var hashIdx = url.indexOf('#');
    var fragment = hashIdx !== -1 ? url.substring(hashIdx) : '';
    var base     = hashIdx !== -1 ? url.substring(0, hashIdx) : url;

    var existingParams = getExistingParamNames(base);
    var filtered = [];
    for (var i = 0; i < pairs.length; i++) {
      var p = pairs[i];
      if (!p || !p.name || !p.value) continue;
      if (existingParams[p.name] || existingParams[encodeURIComponent(p.name)]) continue;
      filtered.push(p);
    }

    if (!filtered.length) return url;
    var qIdx = base.indexOf('?');
    return base + (qIdx !== -1 ? '&' : '?') + buildQueryString(filtered) + fragment;
  }

  // Public entry point, called via callInWindow('gtmUrlDecorator.decorate', pairs)
  // pairs:  [{ name: 'utm_source', value: 'google' }, ...]
  // config is intentionally NOT passed in - it's read from window.gtmUrlDecoratorConfig,
  // which is written by the "Set URL Decoration Config Global" sandboxed tag. Keeping
  // config out of this script's literal text means this script's content never changes
  // when the config is edited, so a CSP hash of this exact script stays valid indefinitely.
  function decorate(pairs, config) {
    pairs = pairs || [];
    config = config || window.gtmUrlDecoratorConfig || {};
    var permittedHosts = config.permittedHosts || [];
    var elementTargets = config.elementTargets || [];

    if (!pairs.length || !permittedHosts.length || !elementTargets.length) return;

    for (var t = 0; t < elementTargets.length; t++) {
      var target   = elementTargets[t];
      var elements = document.querySelectorAll(target.selector);

      for (var j = 0; j < elements.length; j++) {
        var el = elements[j];
        for (var k = 0; k < target.attrs.length; k++) {
          var attr     = target.attrs[k];
          var original = el.getAttribute(attr);
          if (original) {
            var updated = decorateUrl(original, pairs, permittedHosts);
            if (updated !== original) el.setAttribute(attr, updated);
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }

  window.gtmUrlDecorator = { decorate: decorate };

  // --- Detect whether decoration is worth doing on this page -------------
  // This replaces the old CSP-unsafe Custom JavaScript ("jsm") variable that
  // used to gate the decoration trigger. This script's content is fully
  // static (no GTM variable substitution anywhere in it) so it is compatible with a
  // fixed SHA-256 CSP hash rather than requiring a per-page-load nonce. On a
  // match it pushes a plain dataLayer event; the decorator tag fires off a
  // native Custom Event trigger that matches on that event name, so no
  // user-supplied code runs during trigger evaluation either.
  var config = window.gtmUrlDecoratorConfig || {};
  var permittedHosts = config.permittedHosts || [];
  var elementTargets = config.elementTargets || [];
  var targetFound = false;

  for (var t = 0; t < elementTargets.length && !targetFound; t++) {
    var target   = elementTargets[t];
    var elements = document.querySelectorAll(target.selector);

    for (var j = 0; j < elements.length && !targetFound; j++) {
      for (var k = 0; k < target.attrs.length && !targetFound; k++) {
        var url = elements[j].getAttribute(target.attrs[k]);
        if (url && isPermittedHost(url, permittedHosts)) {
          targetFound = true;
        }
      }
    }
  }

  if (targetFound) {
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    window.dataLayer.push({ event: 'urlDecorationTargetFound' });
  }
})();
</script>

tag.name: postMessage Bridge - Receiver (Parent Site)
tag.notes: note the importance of correctly coding the https://{{postMessage Target Host}}, the tag element you are tracking - iframe, and the kinds of events you want to receive from the iframe - the gtm.click events. these must all be correct for the solution to work.

parameter.value:
<script>
(function() {
  if (window.__gtmPmBootstrapped) return;
  window.__gtmPmBootstrapped = true;

  window.addEventListener('message', function(evt) {
    try {
      var cfg = window.__gtmPmConfig || {};
      var allowed = cfg.allowedOrigins || [];
      if (allowed.length && allowed.indexOf(evt.origin) === -1) return;

      if (cfg.iframeElementId) {
        var el = document.getElementById(cfg.iframeElementId);
        if (!el || evt.source !== el.contentWindow) return;
      }

      if (typeof window.__gtmPmReceiver === 'function') {
        window.__gtmPmReceiver(evt.origin, evt.data);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      // Malformed or inaccessible cross-origin message -- ignore.
    }
  }, false);
})();
</script>

tag.name: Diagnostic - Is postMessage Alive (Parent Site)
tag.notes: diagnostic tag. turn it on to see in the dataLayer if the postMessage processing is alive

parameter.value:
<script>
(function() {
  var TAG = '[PM DIAG - PARENT]';
  console.log(TAG, 'installed at', new Date().toISOString());

  // 1. Log every incoming postMessage, no matter what origin/shape it has.
  window.addEventListener('message', function(e) {
    console.log(TAG, 'raw message received', {
      origin: e.origin,
      sourceIsKnownIframe: !!(document.getElementById('pardot-form-tracking') &&
        e.source === document.getElementById('pardot-form-tracking').contentWindow),
      data: e.data
    });
  });

  // 2. Poll for the receiver's config/callback appearing (confirms Receiver + Bootstrap tags fired).
  var checks = 0;
  var iv = setInterval(function() {
    checks++;
    var cfgReady = typeof window.__gtmPmConfig !== 'undefined';
    var fnReady = typeof window.__gtmPmReceiver === 'function';
    console.log(TAG, 'check #' + checks, { __gtmPmConfig: window.__gtmPmConfig, receiverFnPresent: fnReady });
    if ((cfgReady && fnReady) || checks >= 10) clearInterval(iv);
  }, 500);

  // 3. Watch dataLayer for anything the receiver successfully pushed.
  var origPush = window.dataLayer.push;
  window.dataLayer.push = function() {
    for (var i = 0; i < arguments.length; i++) {
      var item = arguments[i];
      if (item && typeof item === 'object' && item.event && item.event.indexOf('iframe.') === 0) {
        console.log(TAG, 'bridged event landed in dataLayer:', item);
      }
    }
    return origPush.apply(window.dataLayer, arguments);
  };
})();
</script>

trigger.name: postMessage Bridge - Custom Event - All Events (regex .*) (Child Site)
Click - Necessary to Create dataLayer gtm.click (Child Site)
trigger.notes: if you are sending gtm.click from the iframe to the parent site, you must have at least the trigger for gtm.click in the iframe container - even if it is not attached to a tag. the absence of the trigger means the absence of the gtm.click event in the dataLayer and resultingly no iframe.gtm.click will be sent by postMessage.

trigger.name: Click from iframe - iframe.gtm.click (Parent Site)
trigger.notes: the custom event sent by postMessage from the iframe. note that the components tie back to the 'iframe' and 'gtm.click' configuration parameters in the child / iframe. you now have the full payload of the iframe gtm.click in the parent dataLayer. this can be altered for anything captured in the child / iframe based on the event_name in the child / iframe dataLayer.

variable.name: Debug Mode (Preview Only)
variable.notes: Wraps the built-in {{Debug Mode}} variable so the debug_mode config parameter is OMITTED (undefined) on normal traffic rather than explicitly sent. Some GA4/gtag implementations key off the parameter's mere presence, not its value, and omitting it avoids sending a needless param on every hit.

Google may provide), as modified from time to time.


___INFO___

{
  "type": "TAG",
  "id": "cvt_temp_public_id",
  "version": 1,
  "securityGroups": [],
  "displayName": "postMessage Bridge - Sender Configuration",
  "categories": [
    "MARTECH"
  ],
  "brand": {
    "id": "custom_pm_bridge",
    "displayName": "drewspen",
    "thumbnail": "data:image/png;base64,"
  },
  "description": "Computes which new dataLayer events should be forwarded to a trusted parent origin, and stages them for the companion Bootstrap tag to send via postMessage. Install in the child (iframe) container.",
  "containerContexts": [
    "WEB"
  ]
}


___TEMPLATE_PARAMETERS___

[
  {
    "type": "TEXT",
    "name": "targetOrigin",
    "displayName": "Target Origin (parent window)",
    "simpleValueType": true,
    "help": "The exact origin postMessage should be sent to, e.g. https://www.monigle.com"
  },
  {
    "type": "TEXT",
    "name": "namespace",
    "displayName": "Event Namespace",
    "simpleValueType": true,
    "defaultValue": "iframe",
    "help": "Prefix added to forwarded event names, e.g. iframe.custom.form.submit"
  },
  {
    "type": "TEXT",
    "name": "excludeEvents",
    "displayName": "Exclude Events (comma-separated)",
    "simpleValueType": true,
    "defaultValue": "gtm.js, gtm.dom, gtm.load",
    "help": "dataLayer events that should never be forwarded"
  },
  {
    "type": "TEXT",
    "name": "eventAllowlist",
    "displayName": "Event Allowlist (comma-separated, optional)",
    "simpleValueType": true,
    "help": "If set, ONLY these dataLayer event names are forwarded"
  },
  {
    "type": "CHECKBOX",
    "name": "includePageUrl",
    "checkboxText": "Include page URL",
    "simpleValueType": true,
    "defaultValue": true
  },
  {
    "type": "CHECKBOX",
    "name": "includePageTitle",
    "checkboxText": "Include page title",
    "simpleValueType": true,
    "defaultValue": true
  },
  {
    "type": "CHECKBOX",
    "name": "debugMode",
    "checkboxText": "Debug logging",
    "simpleValueType": true,
    "defaultValue": false
  }
]


___SANDBOXED_JS_FOR_WEB_TEMPLATE___

const copyFromWindow = require('copyFromWindow');
const setInWindow = require('setInWindow');
const JSON = require('JSON');
const Object = require('Object');
const templateStorage = require('templateStorage');
const getType = require('getType');
const getUrl = require('getUrl');
const readTitle = require('readTitle');
const logToConsole = require('logToConsole');

function trim(s) {
  while (s.length && s.charAt(0) === ' ') s = s.substring(1);
  while (s.length && s.charAt(s.length - 1) === ' ') s = s.substring(0, s.length - 1);
  return s;
}

function splitList(str) {
  const out = [];
  if (getType(str) !== 'string' || str === '') return out;
  const parts = str.split(',');
  for (let i = 0; i < parts.length; i++) {
    const p = trim(parts[i]);
    if (p.length) out.push(p);
  }
  return out;
}

function contains(list, value) {
  for (let i = 0; i < list.length; i++) {
    if (list[i] === value) return true;
  }
  return false;
}

const targetOrigin = data.targetOrigin;
const namespace = data.namespace || 'iframe';

let excludeList = splitList(data.excludeEvents);
if (excludeList.length === 0) {
  excludeList = ['gtm.js', 'gtm.dom', 'gtm.load'];
}
const allowList = splitList(data.eventAllowlist);

const includePageUrl = data.includePageUrl !== false;
const includePageTitle = data.includePageTitle !== false;
const debug = !!data.debugMode;

if (!targetOrigin) {
  data.gtmOnFailure();
  return;
}

const dl = copyFromWindow('dataLayer');

if (getType(dl) !== 'array') {
  data.gtmOnSuccess();
  return;
}

// Per-target cursor so this tag can safely re-fire on every dataLayer event
// without re-sending history it has already forwarded.
const storageKey = 'cursor::' + targetOrigin + '::' + namespace;
let cursor = templateStorage.getItem(storageKey);
if (getType(cursor) !== 'number') cursor = 0;

// NOTE: sandboxed JS cannot call window.top.postMessage directly -- access_globals
// forbids any key whose first path segment is a predefined global (top, window,
// self, parent, document, location, etc). So this template only *stages* the
// outgoing messages on a plain custom global; the companion static
// "PM Bridge - Sender Bootstrap" Custom HTML tag (sequenced to run immediately
// after this one) performs the actual postMessage call.
const outbox = [];

for (let i = cursor; i < dl.length; i++) {
  const item = dl[i];
  if (getType(item) !== 'object') continue;

  const eventName = item.event;
  const eventNameIsString = getType(eventName) === 'string';

  if (eventNameIsString && contains(excludeList, eventName)) continue;
  if (eventNameIsString && allowList.length > 0 && !contains(allowList, eventName)) continue;
  if (!eventNameIsString && allowList.length > 0) continue;

  const payload = {};
  const keys = Object.keys(item);
  for (let k = 0; k < keys.length; k++) {
    payload[keys[k]] = item[keys[k]];
  }

  if (includePageUrl && getType(payload.pageUrl) === 'undefined') {
    payload.pageUrl = getUrl();
  }
  if (includePageTitle && getType(payload.pageTitle) === 'undefined') {
    payload.pageTitle = readTitle();
  }

  const wrapped = {};
  wrapped[namespace] = payload;
  wrapped.event = namespace + '.' + (eventNameIsString && eventName ? eventName : 'message');

  outbox.push(wrapped);
}

templateStorage.setItem(storageKey, dl.length);

setInWindow('__gtmPmTargetOrigin', targetOrigin, true);
setInWindow('__gtmPmOutbox', outbox, true);

if (debug) {
  logToConsole('[PM Bridge Sender] staged ' + outbox.length + ' event(s) for origin ' + targetOrigin + '; cursor now ' + dl.length);
}

data.gtmOnSuccess();


___WEB_PERMISSIONS___

___NOTES___

Custom postMessage bridge template. Part of a two-tag pair: this sandboxed
template computes/stages data; a companion static Custom HTML tag (sequenced
as its dependent tag) performs the actual window.postMessage call, since
sandboxed JS cannot access window.top directly.

      {
        "type": "NON_EMPTY"
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "type": "TEXT",
    "name": "windowKey",

___SANDBOXED_JS_FOR_WEB_TEMPLATE___

const setInWindow = require('setInWindow');
const JSON = require('JSON');
const logToConsole = require('logToConsole');

var rawConfig = data.configJson || '{}';
var config = JSON.parse(rawConfig);

if (!config) {
  logToConsole('Set URL Decoration Config Global: could not parse configJson');
  config = {};
}

var windowKey = data.windowKey || 'gtmUrlDecoratorConfig';
setInWindow(windowKey, config, true);

data.gtmOnSuccess();


___WEB_PERMISSIONS___

        "versionId": "1"

          "key": "keys",
          "value": {
            "type": 2,
            "listItem": [
              {
                "type": 3,
                "mapKey": [
                  {
                    "type": 1,
                    "string": "key"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": 1,
                    "string": "read"
                  },

                    "type": 1,

___SANDBOXED_JS_FOR_WEB_TEMPLATE___

const setInWindow = require('setInWindow');
const createQueue = require('createQueue');
const JSON = require('JSON');
const getType = require('getType');
const templateStorage = require('templateStorage');
const logToConsole = require('logToConsole');

function trim(s) {
  while (s.length && s.charAt(0) === ' ') s = s.substring(1);
  while (s.length && s.charAt(s.length - 1) === ' ') s = s.substring(0, s.length - 1);
  return s;
}

function splitList(str) {
  const out = [];
  if (getType(str) !== 'string' || str === '') return out;
  const parts = str.split(',');
  for (let i = 0; i < parts.length; i++) {
    const p = trim(parts[i]);
    if (p.length) out.push(p);
  }
  return out;
}

function contains(list, value) {
  for (let i = 0; i < list.length; i++) {
    if (list[i] === value) return true;
  }
  return false;
}

const allowedOrigins = splitList(data.allowedOrigins);
const iframeElementId = data.iframeElementId || '';
const namespace = data.namespace || 'iframe';
const eventAllowlist = splitList(data.eventAllowlist);
const wrapKey = data.wrapKey || 'postMessageData';
const debug = !!data.debugMode;

// Config read by the static bootstrap listener tag.
setInWindow('__gtmPmConfig', {
  allowedOrigins: allowedOrigins,
  iframeElementId: iframeElementId
}, true);

const dataLayerPush = createQueue('dataLayer');

setInWindow('__gtmPmReceiver', function(origin, rawData) {
  if (allowedOrigins.length > 0 && !contains(allowedOrigins, origin)) {
    if (debug) logToConsole('[PM Bridge Receiver] blocked origin: ' + origin);
    return;
  }

  const parsed = JSON.parse(rawData);
  if (getType(parsed) !== 'object') return;

  const eventName = parsed.event;
  if (getType(eventName) !== 'string' || eventName.indexOf(namespace + '.') !== 0) return;

  if (eventAllowlist.length > 0) {
    const suffix = eventName.substring(namespace.length + 1);
    if (!contains(eventAllowlist, suffix)) {
      if (debug) logToConsole('[PM Bridge Receiver] event not allowlisted: ' + suffix);
      return;
    }
  }

  // Idempotency guard: drop an exact repeat of the immediately preceding payload.
  const fingerprint = eventName + '::' + JSON.stringify(parsed[namespace]);
  if (templateStorage.getItem('lastFingerprint') === fingerprint) {
    if (debug) logToConsole('[PM Bridge Receiver] duplicate suppressed: ' + eventName);
    return;
  }
  templateStorage.setItem('lastFingerprint', fingerprint);

  const dlEntry = { event: eventName };
  dlEntry[wrapKey] = parsed;
  dataLayerPush(dlEntry);

  if (debug) logToConsole('[PM Bridge Receiver] pushed:', dlEntry);
}, true);

data.gtmOnSuccess();

___NOTES___

Custom postMessage bridge template. After import, open this template in the
GTM UI, go to the Permissions tab, and grant the permissions listed in the
accompanying install guide (GTM auto-detects them from the code and lets you
add them with one click).
